scripts.dev: npm run build -w @fossil/shared && concurrently -n api,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w api" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.dev:api: npm run build -w @fossil/shared && npm run dev -w api
scripts.dev:client: npm run build -w @fossil/shared && npm run dev -w client
scripts.build: npm run build -w @fossil/shared && npm run build -w api && npm run build -w client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @fossil/shared && npm run typecheck -w api && npm run typecheck -w client
